Project Alpha is our main product initiative for Q1 2026. The deadline is March 15, 2026.
The project lead is Sarah Chen. The engineering team includes Marcus, Priya, and Jake.
The tech stack for Project Alpha is Rust for the backend and React for the frontend.
We are using PostgreSQL as the primary database, with Redis for caching.
The project goal is to build a real-time collaboration platform for distributed teams.
Sprint planning happens every Monday at 10am Eastern. Demo day is every other Friday.
The staging environment is at staging.projectalpha.internal and production is at app.projectalpha.com.
The project budget is $450,000 for the quarter.
